questions.hindi: मैं हर दिन अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का अभ्यास करता हूँ।
options: You are a very good person, aren't you?
I practise speaking English every day.

questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं हर दिन अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का अभ्यास करता हूँ।" = "I practise speaking English every day."

questions.answer: better
